channel.title: thoughts on Senik
channel.description: Recent content in thoughts on Senik

item.title: How to deal with overthinking
item.description: In this world, no two minds think alike. We might have same intentions but each of us think bit differently. To some extent, everybody overthinks things. Some more, some less, but ultimately it is in our nature to overthink. I define overthinking as the chain of excessive overwhelming thoughts that lead us to a circle of insecurity. They may make you not fall asleep easily. Doubt yourself. Make you less confident, or unsteady.
